mapper.select: SELECT rqst_no AS rqstNo, title, board_type AS boardType, ins_dt AS insDt, views FROM board WHERE rqst_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ins_dt DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT c.comment_id AS commentId, c.board_no AS boardNo, b.title AS boardTitle, c.content, c.ins_dt AS insDt, c.likes, c.dislikes FROM comment c LEFT JOIN board b ON b.rqst_no = c.board_no WHERE c.writer = #{userId} ORDER BY c.ins_dt DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
